# PERF-022 negative: banner read once at startup
lang: go
file: PERF-022-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"sync"
	"time"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

var (
	banner    []byte
	bannerErr error
	loadOnce  sync.Once
)

func loadBanner() ([]byte, error) {
	loadOnce.Do(func() {
		banner, bannerErr = os.ReadFile("/etc/banner.txt")
	})
	return banner, bannerErr
}

func Banner(c *gin.Context) {
	b, err := loadBanner()
	if err != nil {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	c.Data(http.StatusOK, "text/plain", b)
	_ = time.Second
}
